title: John Travolta
content: John Joseph Travolta (born February 18, 1954) is an American actor and singer. He rose to fame during the 1970s, appearing on the television sitcom "Welcome Back, Kotter" (1975–1979) and starring in the box office successes "Carrie" (1976), "Saturday Night Fever" (1977), "Grease" (1978) and "Urban Cowboy" (1980).
